text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe modified internet connection settings (HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections) and then made multiple rapid outbound connections to port 5985 (WinRM). While individual actions can be legitimate for svchost, this combination and frequency could indicate an attempt to establish a remote access or C2 channel after modifying network configurations.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost",
    "reg_create",
    "internet settings",
    "connect",
    "5985",
    "WinRM"
  ]
}
